question: State of the biological-aging-clock literature (acceleration in disease)
provenance: ALL 11 records are ILLUSTRATIVE synthetic records (doi prefix 10.9999/*, marked illustrative:true) that demonstrate the evidence-scan detectors on realistic aging-clock themes. None is a real publication; Keystone badges every one as illustrative and never presents it as a real DOI. The published-clock BENCHMARK table (Horvath, Hannum, PhenoAge, GrimAge, scRNA) cites the REAL clock papers separately.
